title: Jaunty Partyware 50x Large Punch Balloons for Kids Ideal Party Bag Fillers - 12 Inch Large Size - Assorted Colours - Fun Children’s Party Ideas - Thick & Strong - Easy to Inflate
features: Party Central: Dive into the ultimate kids party games experience with our durable punch balloons. With the charm of pass the parcel and the excitement of party fillers, these balloons are a must-have for every boys party bag fillers collection. Crafted from strong 8g latex, they're designed for non-stop fun!

Kids' Delight: Spice up your party games for kids by adding grains of rice for an extra layer of noisy fun! These punch balloons guarantee smiles from both big and little kids, making them a top choice for birthdays, Christmas, New Year, and even as super mario party bag fillers.

Vibrant & Versatile: Our pack bursts with 50 multicoloured balloons, including every hue from purple to pink. Ideal as lego party bag fillers or goodie bag fillers for kids, they're easy to inflate and consistently vibrant, setting the tone for any event.

Sturdy & Reliable: No more worries about easily broken elastics. Our punch balloons for party bags come with high-quality, robust elastic bands that promise longevity and fun. Arriving securely attached, they're all set to elevate your party bag gifts collection.

Unbeatable Value: Get 50 large punch balloons, the quintessential party bags fillers for kids. Whether it's a giant balloon spectacle or a subtle addition to your party favours kids set, these balloons promise guaranteed fun for everyone.

The pack includes 50 large punch balloons, providing ample supply for any party or event. What colours are the punch balloons available in? The balloons come in assorted colours, including orange, yellow, pink, purple, blue, green, and red, adding vibrant fun to any party. Are the punch balloons durable and reliable? Yes, made from strong latex and equipped with robust elastic bands, these balloons are designed for long-lasting fun and durability. What are the dimensions of the punch balloons and elastic bands? Each premium punch balloon inflates to a large size - 12" diameter Are these punch balloons suitable for various party themes? Absolutely, these versatile punch balloons are perfect for birthdays, Christmas, New Year, and make super fun party bag fillers for kids.
